message:
✨ Add keyboard controls and exit support to fullscreen player (#3)

- ESC/Backspace exits fullscreen
- Up/Down arrows switch channels (with wrap-around)
- Left/Right arrows adjust volume with overlay indicator
- Pass channel list and index through route extras
- Add ESC badge hint in overlay top bar
- Volume overlay auto-hides after 1.5s

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
